name: XCC Series
description: The XCC range represents Zodiac's entry into the ultra-premium heavy-duty center console market. Designed to bridge the gap between a high-performance rigid hull and the stability of a semi-rigid boat, the XCC series features high freeboards and a double-stepped hull for exceptional fuel economy and stability. This range is built for offshore performance, long-distance cruising, or use as a luxury chase boat. It features a modular cabin with an unusually large interior for its class, including separate head and berth options, while the exterior provides massive social spaces and deep-V sea-keeping abilities.
features: High-performance double-stepped deep-V hull
High freeboards for enhanced safety and dry ride
Removable Neoprene-Hypalon or Carbon-finish tubes
Modular cabin with overnight berth and separate head area
Electric windlass with bow roller
Integrated aft and forward sundecks
Tilting center console with large storage access
Hard-top options with integrated lighting and rod holders
Self-draining deck with high-end upholstery
Kitchen block with sink and fridge options

variants.name: X9CC
variants.description: A compact power cruiser at 28'7" that intelligently combines high-performance navigation with a livable cabin and two large relaxation areas.

variants.name: X10CC
variants.description: The 33' flagship of the Zodiac fleet. A day-cruiser/RIB hybrid that positions itself as a serious offshore contender with twin engines up to 900HP total.

name: Medline Series
description: The Medline series is Zodiac's dedicated 'on-water lounge' range, prioritizing maximum comfort, social space, and relaxation. Engineered for long days of sunbathing and coastal cruising, these boats feature expansive sun-pad areas and a signature U-shaped aft lounge that easily converts into a second sundeck. With a focus on ergonomics and premium finishes, the Medline series acts as a true floating terrace, offering high-end amenities like integrated kitchens and swim platforms without sacrificing Zodiac's legendary stability and sea-keeping performance.
features: VIP Multi-position aft U-lounge (converts to sundeck)
Large bow sunbathing area with premium upholstery
Integrated kitchen/wet bar with sink and fridge (larger models)
Dual swim platforms with telescopic boarding ladder
High-volume console with internal storage and head compartment (9/7.5)
Self-draining deck with EVA teak or non-skid finish
Removable tube system for easy maintenance
Bimini-ready hardware and optional roll bar
Bolster seat for driver and passenger with integrated storage

construction.material: Fiberglass Hull / Neoprene Hypalon or Strongan PVC Tubes

variants.name: Medline 5.8
variants.description: A compact and agile cruiser that packs the full Medline lounge experience into a size that is easy to trailer and launch.

variants.name: Medline 6.8
variants.description: The perfect balance of size and performance, featuring a redesigned console and 14-person capacity for larger groups.

variants.name: Medline 7.5
variants.description: A luxury coastal cruiser with a high-performance hull, featuring a console that can accommodate an optional marine toilet.

variants.name: Medline 9
variants.description: The flagship of the lounge range. Features a cabin with a berth, integrated sink/stove, and twin-engine capability for ultimate luxury cruising.

name: Open Series
description: The Open series is the 'Swiss Army Knife' of the Zodiac fleet. Specifically designed for multi-activity enthusiasts, it serves as the perfect platform for fishing, watersports, diving, and coastal exploration. The range features a deep-V fiberglass hull and a balanced deck layout that optimizes movement and ergonomics. A standout feature is the tilting center console, which provides massive access to a large internal storage locker. Whether configured as a rugged dive boat or a family cruiser, the Open range delivers exceptional versatility and a dry, stable ride in various sea conditions.
features: Tilting center console for easy access to deep storage
Removable tube system for simplified maintenance and transport
High-performance deep-V fiberglass hull
Integrated under-deck fuel tank
GRP bow roller with integrated mooring cleat
Self-draining cockpit
Aft bench with high backrest for comfort and safety
Bimini-ready hardware and optional roll bars
Swim ladder with boarding handles
Molded EVA deck or non-skid deck options

construction.material: Fiberglass Hull / Strongan PVC or Neoprene Hypalon Tubes

variants.name: Open 4.2
variants.description: A versatile 13'9" boat that balances compact dimensions with serious storage capacity.

variants.name: Open 4.8
variants.description: A popular 15'7" cross-over model offering a dry ride and 12-person maximum capacity.

variants.name: Open 5.5
variants.description: The 17'9" all-rounder, frequently used as a primary dayboat for coastal fishing and towing.

variants.name: Open 6.5
variants.description: The flagship of the Open range at 22', offering offshore performance and a massive storage compartment under the tilting console.

name: Pro Series
description: The Pro series is Zodiac's most versatile and customizable 'a la carte' range, designed for those who need a boat tailored to a specific activity. Built on a proven deep-V fiberglass hull, the Pro range features a completely flat, modular deck that allows the owner to choose and position their own console, bolsters, and seating. Its signature removable tube system makes maintenance and storage simple. Whether used for professional diving, fishing, or coastal work, the Pro series is celebrated for its rugged construction and exceptional sea-keeping abilities in heavy conditions.
features: Removable tube system for simplified maintenance
Fully modular deck for 'a la carte' configuration
Large under-deck storage compartments
Heavy-duty shark-fin rub strake
Integrated high-capacity fuel tank (standard on larger models)
Bowsprit with integrated mooring cleat
Double life-line on tubes
Self-draining cockpit with high-volume valves
Internal bailing system
Non-slip deck surface

construction.material: Fiberglass Hull / Strongan PVC or Neoprene Hypalon Tubes

variants.name: Pro 5 5
variants.description: The 17'9" all-rounder with a redesigned deck that optimizes space for fishing or diving gear.

variants.name: Pro 6 5
variants.description: A 20' workhorse offering a massive 15-person capacity and high-performance offshore handling.

variants.name: Pro 7
variants.description: The 22'2" variant designed for high-payload operations and serious coastal exploration.

variants.name: Pro 850
variants.description: The flagship of the utility range at 27'10", used worldwide by professional teams for large crews and heavy equipment.

variants.name: Pro Classic 750
variants.description: Official Zodiac Pro Classic 750 per current manufacturer specifications.

name: Cadet Aero
description: The Cadet Aero is characterized by its high-pressure inflatable H2O floor, which provides excellent rigidity while keeping the boat's overall weight to an absolute minimum. This design allows for quick assembly and easy storage in a dedicated carry bag without the need for heavy floorboards. Featuring Zodiac's patented progressive-capacity buoyancy tubes, the Aero offers superior stability and a higher payload capacity than traditional tenders of the same size. It is the ideal solution for boaters seeking a portable, high-performance ship-to-shore shuttle that can be easily handled by one person.
features: High-pressure inflatable 'H2O' drop-stitch floor
Inflatable keel for improved tracking and maneuverability
Progressive-capacity buoyancy tubes for increased stability
Strongan™ Duotex™ 2x1100 decitex fabric
Welded seam construction
Aluminum engine support plate
Easy-push valves
All-around rubbing strake
Removable aluminum seat
Quick-release oars and integrated oarlock system

variants.name: Cadet 200 Aero
variants.description: The most compact and lightweight model in the range, weighing only 20kg.

variants.name: Cadet 230 Aero
variants.description: A popular 7'7" size that balances easy storage with a 4-HP rating.

variants.name: Cadet 270 Aero
variants.description: An 8'10" tender providing a dry ride and stable platform for up to 3 adults and 1 child.

variants.name: Cadet 310 Aero
variants.description: A spacious 10'2" inflatable capable of carrying 5 people while remaining entirely foldable.

variants.name: Cadet 350 Aero
variants.description: The largest variant in the Aero line, offering maximum interior volume and a 15-HP rating.

name: Cadet ALU
description: The Cadet ALU series is designed for boaters who prioritize rock-solid stability and durability in a portable package. Featuring a high-tensile sectional aluminum floor, these tenders provide a rigid platform that handles gear and heavy use with ease. The inflatable keel ensures excellent tracking and maneuverability, while Zodiac's progressive-capacity buoyancy tubes offer a stable and dry ride. Despite the heavy-duty floor, the Cadet ALU remains a quick-setup option that can be disassembled and stored in its carry bag, making it a rugged yet practical ship-to-shore solution.
features: Sectional high-tensile aluminum floor for maximum rigidity
Inflatable keel for improved tracking and performance
Strongan™ Duotex™ fabric with welded seams
Progressive-capacity buoyancy tubes for stability
Double-position aluminum removable thwart (seat)
Aluminum oars and integrated oarlock system
Integrated bow handle and carrying handles
Towing rings and lifting eyes
Internally-operated bailer
Full-length rubbing strake and cone reinforcements

variants.name: Cadet 270 Alu
variants.description: An 8'10" tender that provides a dry ride and stable platform for up to 4 persons.

variants.name: Cadet 310 Alu
variants.description: A popular 10'2" model balancing interior space with a 15-HP power rating.

variants.name: Cadet 350 Alu
variants.description: The largest ALU variant at 11'6", offering maximum interior volume and 20-HP capability.

name: Nomad RIB ALU
description: The Nomad RIB ALU is Zodiac's next-generation aluminum tender range, engineered to provide a superior sailing experience through a lightweight yet ultra-durable double-floor construction. This double-floor design ensures a flat, comfortable deck for passengers while creating a dry environment by separating the bilge from the floor. Its primary advantage is a high strength-to-weight ratio that reduces strain on yacht davits without compromising performance. The range is highly versatile, featuring numerous watertight storage compartments and an optional console/bench kit for those who prefer steering wheel navigation over tiller control.
features: Double-deck aluminum hull with flat floor
Large integrated watertight bow locker
Lightweight 5083 marine-grade aluminum construction
Choice of Mehler PVC or Orca® Neoprene-Hypalon tubes
Full-length keel protection
Deflecting rubbing strake
Multiple lifting points and aft towing rings
Removable bench (thwart) with under-bench storage bag
Optional console and bench seat KIT
Compatible with KAHE POD 600 electric motors

construction.material: Aluminum Hull / PVC or Hypalon Tubes

variants.name: Nomad 2.7
variants.description: The most compact Nomad model, weighing only 55kg, designed for easy handling and small yacht storage.

variants.name: Nomad 3.1
variants.description: A 10' tender that balances a lightweight profile (61kg) with a 5-person capacity.

variants.name: Nomad 3.3
variants.description: A rugged 10'10" double-floor RIB, ideal for coastal exploration and mid-sized yacht tenders.

variants.name: Nomad 3.6
variants.description: A 12' performance tender rated for up to 30HP, offering significant cargo space and speed.

variants.name: Nomad 3.9
variants.description: The largest in the Nomad range, offering a 7-person capacity and high-stability offshore handling.

name: Yachtline Series
description: The Yachtline range is specifically engineered to serve as a high-end extension of a primary yacht. These luxury tenders feature a V-shaped fiberglass hull with integrated 'Zodiac flaps'—patented built-in planing surfaces that allow the boat to get on plane quickly and stay level even with heavy loads. The design emphasizes elegance and utility, incorporating integrated boarding steps, LED courtesy lighting, and ergonomic seating. With its removable tube system and compact profile, the Yachtline is optimized for storage in tender garages or on davits, while still providing the performance needed for watersports or coastal exploration.
features: V-shaped fiberglass hull with patented integrated planing flaps
Removable tube system in Neoprene-Hypalon or Strongan PVC
Integrated polyester side wings with boarding steps
GRP bow roller with integrated navigation lights
Built-in fuel tank with gauge (most models)
LED courtesy lighting and 12V/USB power sockets
Ergonomic steering console with glove box
Automatic bilge pump and integrated battery box
Double pilot/co-pilot seat with upholstered cushions
Large aft locker and forward mooring compartment

construction.material: Fiberglass Hull / Hypalon or PVC Tubes

variants.name: Yachtline 360
variants.description: A compact 11'10" luxury tender designed for easy handling and efficient storage.

variants.name: Yachtline 400
variants.description: A 13'1" model offering a 5-person capacity and enhanced stability for ship-to-shore transport.

variants.name: Yachtline 440
variants.description: The 14'5" variant featuring increased interior volume and performance for larger yacht operations.

variants.name: Yachtline 490
variants.description: The flagship of the Yachtline range at 16'1", offering 90HP performance and a 9-person capacity.

name: N-ZO Series
description: The N-ZO range is the result of a collaboration with renowned Italian designer Vittorio Garroni, aiming to redefine the aesthetics and functionality of the modern RIB. Centered on the 'Air Console' concept, these boats maximize interior living space by minimizing the console's footprint without losing storage. The range features a super-deep V-hull (Zodiac Shell technology) for high-performance offshore handling and a modular deck layout that can transform from a social lounge to a large sundeck in seconds. With cabin options that include berths and heads, the N-ZO series is built for those who want to combine the safety of a RIB with the luxury of a day-cruiser.
features: Patented 'Air Console' design to maximize interior floor space
Super-deep V-hull with Zodiac Nautic Shell technology
Large bow sundeck (convertible modular design)
Removable tubes in Neoprene-Hypalon fabric
Integrated aft swimming platforms
Cabin with overnight berth and optional chemical toilet (N-ZO 760/700)
Hydraulic steering and leaning post with folding table
Shower kit with integrated freshwater tank
Electric windlass and integrated bow roller
Self-bailing cockpit and large waterproof storage compartments

variants.name: N Zo 680
variants.description: A popular 22'4" model known for its 14-person capacity and excellent rough-water handling.

variants.name: N-ZO 700 Cabine
variants.description: Official Zodiac N-ZO 700 Cabine per current manufacturer specifications.

variants.name: N Zo 760
variants.description: The 24'11" flagship of the N-ZO range, featuring a 350HP power rating and a spacious forward cabin.
